destination: EasyPost Shipments (test mode) — DRAFT pending ADR-0012 (recorded fallback C2 candidate)

attribution.notes: DRAFT (2026-07-22 research pass; no live call has ever been made): shipment creation documents NO request idempotency key (C2 fit); `reference` is caller-set and echoed on read-back but NOT unique and NOT a list filter — queries are by destination id only, and reconciliation coverage runs through windowed enumeration (page_size ≤ 100, before_id paging, ~5 req/s list budget). Test objects retained 30 days — the enumeration/audit horizon. No consistency SLA is documented (null lags ⇒ confirmed-absence escalates to humans, never auto-redispatch, RFC-002 §6.2). evidence_quality EI until the P4 spike contract-tests every claim.
